trigger_condition: extractorProfile.mappings (v.any) receives malformed data from a verify bug
guard_snippet: validate mappings shape: if (typeof v !== 'string' || !isId(v)) throw ConvexError('Bad mapping')
potential_consequence: Corrupt JSON injected verbatim into Claude system prompt; extraction broken permanently for property

trigger_condition: Two different companies create properties with identical trimmed names; same slug generated
guard_snippet: slug uniqueness check must include companyId: .eq('companyId', profile.companyId).eq('slug', slug)
potential_consequence: Global slug collision; property routing ambiguous; potential cross-tenant data access via route params

trigger_condition: Auditor userProfile exists but propertyId is undefined due to registration bug
guard_snippet: if (profile.role === 'auditor' && !profile.propertyId) throw new ConvexError('Auditor account not configured')
potential_consequence: undefined !== any Id is always true; auditor silently denied every request with no actionable error

trigger_condition: Better Auth sign-up succeeds but userProfile document creation fails silently
guard_snippet: define explicit onUserCreate hook in auth.ts; verify profile existence in sign-in flow before token issuance
potential_consequence: Authenticated user permanently locked out with 'No profile' on every Convex call; no recovery path

trigger_condition: App-level 30s timeout not implemented as Promise.race; Convex action runs to 10-minute hard limit
guard_snippet: await Promise.race([runClaude(), sleep(30_000).then(() => { throw new Error('timeout') })]); mark timeout in catch
potential_consequence: extractionStatus stays 'in_progress' for 10 min; property-level upload lock never released

trigger_condition: extractionResults with 24hr expiresAt TTL have no cleanup cron defined anywhere in architecture
guard_snippet: crons.daily('cleanup-expired-extractions', { hourUTC: 3 }, internal.ingestion.deleteExpiredResults)
potential_consequence: 18,250+ orphaned extractionResults records accumulate per year at 50 properties; unbounded DB growth

trigger_condition: Client uploads file to Convex storage then crashes before calling recordUpload mutation
guard_snippet: crons.daily('cleanup-orphaned-storage') deletes storageIds absent from any dataImports record after 1hr
potential_consequence: Orphaned files accumulate in Convex storage with no record; untracked storage cost, no cleanup path

trigger_condition: File flagged infected or scan_failed; rejected upload remains in Convex storage indefinitely
guard_snippet: on scan reject: await ctx.storage.delete(import.storageId); set dataImports.storageId = undefined
potential_consequence: Malware or suspicious files persist in tenant storage; regulatory risk; storage quota consumed by rejected files

trigger_condition: Specific past paceSnapshot for (d_ly, d_ly - advance_days) missing; not total LY absence
guard_snippet: if (!ly_otb_at_same_advance) skip date's pickup calc; use flat OTB × budget_adr fallback for that date only
potential_consequence: NaN from null subtraction propagates into ly_remaining_pickup and projected_rooms for affected dates

trigger_condition: paceSnapshot from exactly 7 days ago missing for a forecastDate; otb_7_days_ago[d] is null
guard_snippet: search nearest snapshot within ±3 days of target; if none found, velocity_ratio = 1.0 with 'sparse data' label
potential_consequence: NaN velocity_ratio; clamp(NaN, 0, 3) = NaN; projected_rooms[d] = NaN; forecast chart breaks for affected dates

trigger_condition: budgetAdr, current_otb_adr, and lyAdr all null; rate fallback chain fully exhausted
guard_snippet: if (!rate) { projected_revenue[d] = null; mark date as 'rate unavailable' in chart; skip multiplication }
potential_consequence: projected_rooms × null = NaN; silently renders as $0 or crashes forecast chart render

trigger_condition: AWS Malware Protection delivers results via SNS/EventBridge events, not synchronous poll endpoint
guard_snippet: implement webhook internalHttpAction to receive GuardDuty findings; do not poll AWS API from Convex action
potential_consequence: Polling loop receives no response; all uploads time out at 15s with scan_failed; extraction pipeline blocked

trigger_condition: XLSX file has multiple sheets; SheetJS reads only first sheet by default
guard_snippet: iterate workbook.SheetNames; select sheet with highest numeric cell count or concatenate all sheets
potential_consequence: Revenue categories on sheets 2+ silently omitted; partial extraction with no warning to auditor

trigger_condition: 50MB CSV or multi-page PDF parsed to text exceeds Claude claude-sonnet-4-6 context window
guard_snippet: estimate token count before Claude call; if > 150_000 tokens, truncate with warning or reject with guidance
potential_consequence: Claude API returns 400 context-length error; extraction fails with no user-visible explanation about file size

trigger_condition: Two verify sessions for same property confirm simultaneously; both write to extractorProfile.mappings
guard_snippet: confirmVerify reads current mappings and merges new labels; use patch not replace to avoid clobbering concurrent writes
potential_consequence: One session's corrected label mappings silently overwritten; extractor profile regresses to prior state

trigger_condition: budgets.month stored with value outside 1–12 range (0, 13, -1) via CSV import or direct call
guard_snippet: if (month < 1 || month > 12) throw new ConvexError('month must be 1–12')
potential_consequence: Invalid budget row included in month grouping; forecast month-end totals wrong or query throws

trigger_condition: ly_otb_at_stay uses last paceSnapshot for d_ly, not verified auditRecord.roomsOccupied as actuals
guard_snippet: ly_final_rooms = auditRecord(d_ly).roomStatistics.roomsOccupied ?? lastPaceSnapshot(d_ly).roomsOnBooks
potential_consequence: LY remaining pickup understated when OTB diverges from actuals; forecast underestimates fill for busy dates

trigger_condition: totalRooms updated upward after audit records exist; historical occupancy exceeds 100%
guard_snippet: on totalRooms change: warn 'N historical records will show recalculated occupancy — some may exceed 100%'
potential_consequence: Dashboard and history charts display impossible >100% occupancy for past dates without explanation

trigger_condition: Lock check query and generateUploadUrl are separate Convex operations; race window between them
guard_snippet: combine lock check + generateUploadUrl in single mutation: if (inFlight) throw; else return ctx.storage.generateUploadUrl()
potential_consequence: Two simultaneous uploads both pass lock check; concurrent extractions race on same property/date

trigger_condition: auditDate stored as string with no ISO-8601 format validation at mutation boundary
guard_snippet: if (!/^\d{4}-(?:0[1-9]|1[0-2])-(?:0[1-9]|[12]\d|3[01])$/.test(auditDate)) throw ConvexError('Invalid date')
potential_consequence: Non-ISO strings break date sort and comparison; forecast and history queries return wrong or empty results

trigger_condition: Alert re-fired by cron (status → active); next day cron sees condition still met; fires again without new dismissal
guard_snippet: on re-fire: set refireAfter = now + 7_days; require new explicit dismissal before next re-fire cycle
potential_consequence: Alert fires every cron cycle after first re-fire with no dampening; owner receives daily alert spam

trigger_condition: Multiple paymentTypes records have isDefault=true for same propertyId; no uniqueness constraint
guard_snippet: before insert: if (await ctx.db.query('paymentTypes').withIndex('by_propertyId').filter(p => p.isDefault).first()) reject
potential_consequence: UI shows multiple default payment types; report grouping logic picks arbitrary default; payment totals wrong

trigger_condition: fileSizeBytes is client-provided value; actual file size in Convex storage never verified server-side
guard_snippet: after upload: fetch storage metadata via ctx.storage.getMetadata(storageId); compare actual vs reported size
potential_consequence: Client spoofs fileSizeBytes as 1 byte; 50MB+ file bypasses size guard and reaches malware scan and extraction

trigger_condition: Large categories list + full mappings + 365 pace rows all injected into single Claude system prompt
guard_snippet: measure token count pre-call; if > 150_000 tokens, truncate mappings to most-recently-confirmed 200 labels
potential_consequence: Claude API rejects with context_length_exceeded; extraction fails for mature properties with rich PMS history

trigger_condition: PMS report uses accounting notation '(1,234.56)' for negative amounts; Claude extracts as positive
guard_snippet: add to system prompt: 'Parenthesized amounts are negative: (1234.56) must be extracted as -1234.56'
potential_consequence: Refund amounts extracted as positive revenue; reconciliation check passes incorrectly; totals overstated

trigger_condition: Actuals sum in forecast includes auditRecords with status 'draft' or 'pending_verification'
guard_snippet: filter: auditRecord.status === 'verified' only when summing past actuals for month-end projection
potential_consequence: Unconfirmed draft entries inflate forecast_total; month-end projection overstated until verification

trigger_condition: 7-year file deletion cron deletes Convex storage objects; corresponding dataImports DB records remain
guard_snippet: on file deletion: set dataImports.storageId = undefined; add dataImports.fileDeletedAt timestamp
potential_consequence: All download links for 7+ year old files return 'file unavailable' without DB reflecting this state

trigger_condition: Churned property document deletion order unspecified; roomStatistics may be deleted before auditRecords
guard_snippet: deletion order: nonRoomRevenue → roomStatistics → paymentRecords → competitionData → auditRecords → dataImports → property
potential_consequence: Queries joining on auditId find no roomStatistics mid-deletion; silent partial data returned to any concurrent reader

trigger_condition: Auditor hits role guard redirect; no target route defined for the redirect destination
guard_snippet: throw redirect({ to: '/$propertyId/upload', params: { propertyId: profile.propertyId! } })
potential_consequence: Redirect throws routing error or lands on 404; auditor stuck in redirect loop or blank page

trigger_condition: getAuth server function throws (auth service unavailable); context.isAuthenticated is undefined not false
guard_snippet: catch all errors in getAuth: return { isAuthenticated: false, session: null }; never propagate auth service errors as 500
potential_consequence: SSR throws unhandled exception; entire app renders error boundary or blank page during auth service blip

trigger_condition: extractionId field in dataImports has no defined purpose; never populated if action crashes before setting it
guard_snippet: define extractionId as Convex scheduler job ID returned by ctx.scheduler.runAfter; store it to enable cancellation
potential_consequence: No handle to cancel or query a stuck in_progress extraction; debugging hung extractions requires manual DB inspection

trigger_condition: Claude API returns 429 or 503 during extraction action; no retry strategy defined
guard_snippet: exponential backoff: 3 retries with 2s/4s/8s delays before marking status 'failed'; log failure reason
potential_consequence: Transient Claude outage permanently fails all in-flight extractions; auditors must manually re-upload to retry
